message:
chore: include concurrent agent changes (macro recording infra, palette, formatting)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -488,7 +488,7 @@
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.8","title":"Task: Toasts/notifications + footer HUD on ftui (status, progress, latency/cache badges)","description":"## Goal
Port the transient notification system and footer HUD.

## Requirements
- Toasts for: saved view actions, errors, confirmations.
- Footer HUD shows:
  - indexing progress (if background indexer running)
  - active filters summary
  - cache/latency indicators (where available)

## Implementation Notes
- Prefer `ftui-widgets::toast` + `notification_queue` + `status_line`.
- Ensure "decorative" elements can degrade away under perf budgets.

## Tests
- Snapshot tests for:
  - multiple stacked toasts
  - footer HUD at different widths
- Unit tests for toast queue state transitions.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Toasts never obscure critical input affordances.
- Footer remains readable and does not flicker under updates.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:29:40.401803009Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T21:33:48.909143407Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T21:33:48.909115375Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","tui","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.8","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:29:40.401803009Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.8","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:45.935193883Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.8","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:46.263415110Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.9","title":"Task: Multi-select + bulk actions + multi-open queue on ftui (Ctrl+Enter queue, Ctrl+O open)","description":"## Goal
Port and harden the results multi-select system:
- toggle select
- queue multiple items
- open queued items in editor
- bulk menu for copy/export/tag (as currently supported)

## Requirements
- Confirmation prompt for large batches (>=12) is preserved.
- Keyboard-first; mouse optional.

## Implementation Notes
- Represent selection as stable IDs (source_path + line/idx) rather than list indices.
- Ensure selection survives resorting/reranking.

## Tests
- Unit tests for selection logic:
  - toggle select
  - queue behavior
  - clear queue
- Simulation test: select 3 hits, press bulk open, assert command is emitted.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Bulk open uses $EDITOR splitting logic consistent with current implementation.
- No accidental shell injection when opening paths (must keep safe argument passing).","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:29:51.706832751Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T04:24:02.148853198Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T04:24:02.148828432Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","tui","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.9","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:29:51.706832751Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.9","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:46.562778672Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4","title":"Epic: FrankenTUI-powered enhancements (inline mode, recording/replay, inspectors, power features)","description":"## Goal
Go beyond parity and fully leverage ftui capabilities to make cass uniquely powerful and beautiful.

## Themes
- Inline mode: keep scrollback while UI chrome stays anchored.
- Recording/replay: deterministic capture of UI sessions for bug reports and automation.
- Power navigation: better focus mgmt, command palette everywhere, saved views UX.
- Debug/inspector overlays to keep performance and correctness under control.

## Notes
Every enhancement must preserve robot/headless discipline and remain optional or gracefully degrading.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:31:10.442685607Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T07:31:10.442685607Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["enhancements","ftui","tui","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:31:10.442685607Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.1","title":"Task: Inline mode for cass TUI (anchored UI + scrollback-preserving logs)","description":"## Goal
Add a first-class inline mode powered by ftui:
- UI chrome stays anchored (top or bottom) while logs/output scroll normally.
- Perfect for long-running indexing/sync where you want live status without losing scrollback.

## CLI/Config
- Add flags (names TBD, but must be explicit):
  - `cass tui --inline`
  - `--ui-height <rows>`
  - optional `--anchor top|bottom`

## Implementation Notes
- Use `ftui_runtime::ScreenMode::Inline { ui_height }` + `UiAnchor`.
- Integrate with logging story from `coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.7`:
  - logs scroll, UI remains stable
  - avoid interleaving output from non-UI writers

## Tests
- PTY e2e test:
  - run `cass tui --inline --once` while emitting synthetic logs
  - verify scrollback content remains (no alt-screen)
  - verify UI frame shows at the anchored region

## Acceptance Criteria
- Inline mode never trashes scrollback.
- Inline mode still supports core interactions (search, filters) without flicker.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:31:30.424616284Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T00:31:58.107202985Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","inline","tui","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:16.796760464Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:17.089206606Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:17.379129955Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:31:30.424616284Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
+{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.1","title":"Task: Inline mode for cass TUI (anchored UI + scrollback-preserving logs)","description":"## Goal
Add a first-class inline mode powered by ftui:
- UI chrome stays anchored (top or bottom) while logs/output scroll normally.
- Perfect for long-running indexing/sync where you want live status without losing scrollback.

## CLI/Config
- Add flags (names TBD, but must be explicit):
  - `cass tui --inline`
  - `--ui-height <rows>`
  - optional `--anchor top|bottom`

## Implementation Notes
- Use `ftui_runtime::ScreenMode::Inline { ui_height }` + `UiAnchor`.
- Integrate with logging story from `coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.7`:
  - logs scroll, UI remains stable
  - avoid interleaving output from non-UI writers

## Tests
- PTY e2e test:
  - run `cass tui --inline --once` while emitting synthetic logs
  - verify scrollback content remains (no alt-screen)
  - verify UI frame shows at the anchored region

## Acceptance Criteria
- Inline mode never trashes scrollback.
- Inline mode still supports core interactions (search, filters) without flicker.","notes":"Implemented inline mode: --inline, --ui-height, --anchor flags. Uses ftui App::inline() builder with UiAnchor. PTY e2e test verifies no alt-screen. Commit 2578c6c.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:31:30.424616284Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T11:42:52.196855217Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T11:42:52.196767574Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","inline","tui","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:16.796760464Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:17.089206606Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:17.379129955Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:31:30.424616284Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.10","title":"Task: Advanced navigation modes (conversation-grouped results, timeline jump, agent/workspace quick-switch)","description":"## Goal
Use ftui widgets (tree/table/paginator) to add navigation modes beyond the current list:
- Toggle between:
  - message-hit list (current)
  - conversation-grouped list (collapse multiple hits per session)
- Timeline navigation:
  - jump by day/week
  - quick-jump to most recent activity per agent/workspace
- Quick switchers:
  - agent switcher
  - workspace switcher

## Notes
- Must remain fast; prefer virtualization.
- Grouped view should not change underlying search correctness; it is purely a presentation aggregation.

## Tests
- Unit tests for grouping logic.
- Snapshot tests for grouped view.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Grouped view improves scanability on broad queries.
- Users can navigate to “what I did last week in project X” in a few keystrokes.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:36:54.040790465Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T05:53:17.347626392Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T05:53:17.347604511Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","tui","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.10","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:21.978393137Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.10","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:21.737368842Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.10","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:36:54.040790465Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.11","title":"Task: Undo/redo for query + filter editing (command history panel, safe state rollback)","description":"## Goal
Add undo/redo for the most common state mutations:
- query edits
- filter add/remove/edit
- saved view load/apply

## Why
A power-user TUI should be fearless: users should be able to explore without fear of losing a good state.

## Implementation Notes
- Leverage `ftui_runtime::undo` and/or `ftui-widgets::history_panel`.
- Define an explicit command set for reversible operations.

## Tests
- Unit tests for undo stack behavior.
- Simulation tests: apply filters, undo, ensure search query + results return to prior state.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Undo is deterministic and never corrupts persisted state.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:49:09.598823035Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T06:03:37.952787324Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T06:03:37.952764742Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","tui","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.11","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:49:09.598823035Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.12","title":"Task: Smarter contextual key hints (ftui hint_ranker + help registry; reduce cognitive load)","description":"## Goal
Improve the contextual help strip so it shows the *right* hints at the *right* time.

## Approach
- Use `ftui-widgets::hint_ranker` / `help_registry` to rank hints based on:
  - current focus region
  - current modal stack
  - current selection state (multi-select active, detail open)
  - user's usage history (optional, local-only)

## Tests
- Unit tests: given state, top N hints are stable and relevant.
- Snapshot tests for help strip in key contexts.

## Acceptance Criteria
- New users can discover primary flows without opening full help.
- Hints never lie: only show hints that are actually valid in the current state.","notes":"Implemented contextual footer hint ranking in ftui CassApp using ftui hint_ranker + help_registry. Added context-aware hint sets for results/detail/filter/analytics/modal states, integrated into status footer rendering, and added unit tests: contextual_footer_hints_* plus updated status_footer_adapts_to_width. Verified with cargo fmt --check, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/cass-target-silverbridge cargo check --all-targets, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/cass-target-silverbridge cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings, and targeted cargo test runs for hint tests.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:49:20.823943090Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T10:06:14.326413289Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T10:06:14.326386169Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["a11y","ftui","tui","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.12","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:49:20.823943090Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
@@ -510,7 +510,7 @@
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.7","title":"Task: Analytics tools view (per-tool usage: calls, avg tokens/call, cost/call, trends)","description":"## Goal
Provide a dedicated Tools analytics view that answers:
- which tools are used most
- how tool usage changes over time
- how expensive each tool is (tokens/cost per invocation)

## Data Requirements
- Requires per-tool-name extraction + rollups (z9fse.6).

## UI
- Table of tools (virtualized): tool name, calls, avg tokens/call, p95 tokens/call (optional), trend sparkline.
- Optional mini chart: tool calls over time for selected tool.
- Filter box: type to filter tool list.

## Drilldown
- `Enter` on a tool:
  - opens Search view filtered to sessions that invoked that tool (when traceable)
  - OR opens Explorer overlayed by that tool.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Works on large corpora (1000+ distinct tools) without lag.
- Deterministic ordering and stable rounding.

## Testing & Logging
- Snapshot: deterministic tool table for fixture.
- Integration: fixture with known tool calls verifies counts.
- PTY e2e: open tools view, filter, select tool, drilldown.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:09.010331432Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T07:03:00.480355712Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T07:03:00.480321779Z","close_reason":"Enhanced tools view: replaced simple bar chart with rich table layout (Agent/Calls/Messages/API Tokens/Calls-per-1K/Share columns), added daily tool calls sparkline, summary footer, header row. Added tools_row_count() for selection bounds (cap 20), wired tool_rows into AnalyticsChartData. Updated drilldown to use tool_rows. 8 new tests. Clippy/fmt clean.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["analytics","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:09.010331432Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:09.010331432Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:09.010331432Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-z9fse.12","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:09.010331432Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-z9fse.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:09.010331432Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.8","title":"Task: Analytics cost/models view (USD estimates, provider breakdown, model trends)","description":"## Goal
Make cost real and visible: a dedicated view showing token usage AND estimated USD cost by model/provider over time.

## Data Requirements
- z9fse.11: model_name dimension available in analytics query layer.
- z9fse.10: cost estimation implemented + exposed in queries.

## UI
- Left pane: models table (virtualized): model name, tokens, USD, coverage.
- Right pane: time-series for selected model (tokens + USD).
- Provider rollup section: anthropic vs openai vs google.

## UX
- Toggle between:
  - Tokens mode (stacked by input/output/cache/thinking)
  - USD mode (stacked by input/output/cache)
- Coverage diagnostics:
  - highlight models with unknown pricing
  - highlight messages that are estimate-only

## Drilldown
- `Enter` on a model opens Explorer filtered to that model.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Cost numbers match known fixtures exactly.
- Coverage diagnostics prevent “false precision” (never silently show USD if pricing unknown).

## Testing & Logging
- Snapshot: deterministic table sorting + chart output.
- Integration: seeded pricing fixture verifies USD math.
- PTY e2e: open cost view, select model, toggle USD/tokens, drilldown.","notes":"Enhanced Cost/Models view: side-by-side bar charts (tokens + USD cost per model), pricing coverage bar, unpriced models warning with token counts, daily cost sparkline. Data loaded from query_breakdown(Model, EstimatedCostUsd/MessageCount) and query_unpriced_models(). Selection + drilldown preserved.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"ubuntu","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:24.474582561Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T07:03:32.187313106Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T07:03:32.187154661Z","close_reason":"Enhanced Cost view with: cost summary header (total USD, per-message, per-1K-tokens rates, coverage %), semantic cost-level coloring (green/yellow/red), model bar chart with dedicated color palette, and daily cost sparkline. All quality gates pass (check, clippy, fmt, tests).","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["analytics","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.8","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:24.474582561Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.8","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:24.474582561Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.8","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:24.474582561Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.8","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-z9fse.10","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:24.474582561Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.8","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-z9fse.11","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:24.474582561Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.8","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-z9fse.12","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:24.474582561Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.9","title":"Task: Analytics coverage view (API vs estimated; weak connectors/sources spotlight)","description":"## Goal
Make data quality legible: show where token numbers are “real API usage” vs “content-length estimate”.

## UI
- Heatmap-like matrix:
  - rows: agent_slug (and optionally model/provider)
  - columns: time buckets (weeks or months)
  - cell value: coverage %
- Side panel:
  - top worst coverage agents/models
  - deltas vs prior period
  - hints: “Codex coverage improved after token_count wiring (z9fse.5)”

## Semantics
- Coverage % = api_coverage_message_count / message_count
- Clarify what counts as API coverage: `api_data_source == 'api'`.

## UX
- `Enter` on a cell opens Explorer with filters pinned to that agent + time range.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Coverage view makes it impossible to misinterpret “estimate-only” datasets.
- Sorting and aggregation are deterministic.

## Testing & Logging
- Snapshot: deterministic heatmap for fixture.
- Unit: coverage % math and rounding.
- PTY e2e: open coverage view, drilldown.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:39.733955186Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T07:09:54.232260080Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T07:09:54.232149815Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["analytics","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.9","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:39.733955186Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.9","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:39.733955186Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.9","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:39.733955186Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.9","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-z9fse.12","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:39.733955186Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.2","title":"Task: Input macro recording + playback (user automation + reproducible bug reports)","description":"## Goal
Leverage `ftui_runtime::input_macro` to let users:
- record a sequence of inputs (keys/mouse) while using the TUI
- save macros to a file under the cass data dir
- replay a macro deterministically

## Use Cases
- Reproduce a UI bug reliably.
- Create personal workflows: apply filters, run searches, export.

## CLI/UX
- Interactive:
  - key to start/stop recording (must be in help/palette)
  - toast showing recording state
- CLI flags:
  - `cass tui --play-macro <path>`
  - `cass tui --record-macro <path>` (non-interactive automation)

## Tests
- Unit tests for macro serialization format.
- Simulation test: record events, replay, assert resulting model state.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Macro playback yields identical final state across runs (deterministic).

+{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.2","title":"Task: Input macro recording + playback (user automation + reproducible bug reports)","description":"## Goal
Leverage `ftui_runtime::input_macro` to let users:
- record a sequence of inputs (keys/mouse) while using the TUI
- save macros to a file under the cass data dir
- replay a macro deterministically

## Use Cases
- Reproduce a UI bug reliably.
- Create personal workflows: apply filters, run searches, export.

## CLI/UX
- Interactive:
  - key to start/stop recording (must be in help/palette)
  - toast showing recording state
- CLI flags:
  - `cass tui --play-macro <path>`
  - `cass tui --record-macro <path>` (non-interactive automation)

## Tests
- Unit tests for macro serialization format.
- Simulation test: record events, replay, assert resulting model state.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Macro playback yields identical final state across runs (deterministic).
- Macro files redact sensitive paths if required (configurable).","notes":"Recording implemented: --record-macro saves JSONL with key/modifier/timing data. Live playback deferred (needs ftui event injection API). Macro files can be replayed in tests via ProgramSimulator. 6 unit tests + PTY e2e test. Commit cc7ee6a.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:31:45.293981872Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T12:01:43.063893847Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T12:01:43.063806043Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["automation","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:17.667396004Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:31:45.293981872Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.3","title":"Task: Render trace + time-travel capture (record frames/events; attach to failures; inspector view)","description":"## Goal
Make the TUI *debuggable* and *testable* at kernel level by leveraging ftui's tracing and harness tooling:
- record render traces (diff stats, timings)
- optionally record compressed frame snapshots for time-travel inspection
- optionally record asciicast output for sharing

## CLI/Config
- `cass tui --trace-render <path>`: record render trace
- `cass tui --trace-events <path>`: record event stream
- optional `cass tui --trace-bundle <dir>` to write a bug-report bundle:
  - render trace
  - event macro
  - tui_state.json
  - system capabilities snapshot

## Implementation Notes
- Use `ftui_runtime::render_trace` and/or `ftui_harness::time_travel` data formats.
- Provide a built-in inspector screen that can replay a trace bundle inside cass itself.

## Tests
- In CI, on TUI test failures, automatically write a trace bundle to `test-results/`.
- Unit tests that trace writers are gated behind flags and do not affect normal perf.

## Acceptance Criteria
- A flaky UI bug becomes reproducible from a trace bundle.
- Trace bundle contains enough context to debug without rerunning on the original machine.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:32:03.858616009Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T21:09:07.983788589Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T21:09:07.983763112Z","close_reason":"Implemented render trace + time-travel capture: new src/ui/trace.rs module with TraceWriter (JSONL frame/event recording), FrameRecord/EventRecord types, SystemInfo capture, trace bundle writer/reader. CLI flags: --trace-render PATH, --trace-events PATH, --trace-bundle DIR. Integrated with both ftui interactive and headless entry points. 7 unit tests + 2 integration tests (trace JSONL output, bundle directory creation). All 160+ tests pass, clippy/fmt clean.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["debug","ftui","tests","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:17.962827401Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:18.244527139Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:32:03.858616009Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.4","title":"Task: Built-in UI inspector + debug overlays (layout, hit regions, frame budgets, diff stats)","description":"## Goal
Expose ftui's introspection capabilities directly in cass for both developers and power users.

## Features
- Toggleable inspector overlay showing:
  - widget tree / layout bounds
  - focus state
  - hit-test regions
  - frame timing and diff size
  - degradation state (essential-only vs full)
- Optional VOI/performance overlays if useful.

## Implementation Notes
- Prefer `ftui-widgets::inspector` / `layout_debugger` / debug overlay widgets.
- Must be fully optional and off by default.

## Tests
- Snapshot tests with overlay enabled.
- Unit tests that overlay does not affect core interactions when disabled.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Overlay is the fastest way to debug a weird layout/selection issue.
- Overlay never crashes in narrow terminals (auto-disable or simplify).","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:32:19.527765696Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T23:50:25.132724458Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["debug","ftui","performance","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:18.536040241Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:18.814600147Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:32:19.527765696Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.5","title":"Task: Interactive theme editor (preview, export/import theme config, accessibility checks)","description":"## Goal
Turn cass theming from a fixed preset list into a power-user feature:
- interactive theme editor screen
- live preview across core panes
- export/import theme config file
- built-in contrast/a11y checks (warn when below thresholds)

## Notes
- Use `ftui_style::ThemeBuilder` for incremental edits.
- Theme config should be stored under data dir and be additive/versioned.

## Tests
- Unit tests for theme serialization/deserialization.
- Snapshot tests for a custom theme.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Users can create a theme that works in both truecolor and 16-color fallback.
- High-contrast mode remains one-keystroke away.","notes":"Implemented theme-config foundations in src/ui/style_system.rs: versioned ThemeConfig/ThemeColorOverrides schema, JSON import/export helpers, override validation + typed errors, ThemeBuilder-based additive overrides, and ThemeContrastReport diagnostics (WCAG thresholds). Added tests for serde roundtrip, snapshot JSON stability, invalid color rejection, ANSI16 downgrade, low-contrast detection, and file roundtrip. Validation currently blocked by unrelated workspace compile failures in src/ui/app.rs saved-views branch and analytics churn; rustfmt --check src/ui/style_system.rs passes.","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:32:38.378784714Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T05:30:21.444384538Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","style","tui","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:19.369591892Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:19.091556033Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:32:38.378784714Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.6","title":"Task: Performance guardrails for ftui TUI (benchmarks for frame time, diff size, search latency)","description":"## Goal
Prevent performance regressions in the new TUI.

## Deliverables
- Benchmarks / tests that track:
  - view render time for key screens
  - diff size/bytes emitted per frame
  - search pipeline latency under typing
- A documented budget (ms and bytes) with thresholds.

## Acceptance Criteria
- A 2x regression in render time or diff size fails CI (or at least fails a perf test job).
- Budgets are realistic and measured on representative datasets.","notes":"Fresh-eyes follow-up on shared PTY perf harness file: fixed UTF-8 boundary panic risk in truncate_output() used by perf/assertion diagnostics. Validation green: cargo fmt --check; cargo test --test e2e_tui_smoke_flows tui_pty_ -- --nocapture --test-threads=1; cargo check --all-targets; cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:38:54.197196741Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T10:34:21.150144210Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T10:34:21.150117921Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","performance","tests","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:40.845742857Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:41.068094061Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:38:54.197196741Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.7","title":"Task: CI failure artifacts for TUI tests (trace bundles, last-frames, event streams, logs)","description":"## Goal
When any TUI-related test fails, we should have a "forensic bundle" to debug quickly.

## Deliverables
- Standard artifact directory under `test-results/` for:
  - render trace
  - event macro / event stream
  - last N frame snapshots (text + ANSI)
  - cass.log excerpt
  - environment/capabilities snapshot
- Ensure artifacts are uploaded by CI job (where workflows allow).

## Acceptance Criteria
- A failure in PTY e2e test produces a bundle without additional manual steps.
- Bundles are bounded in size (cap frames and log length).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:39:09.370414459Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T21:20:31.424442145Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T21:20:31.424415746Z","close_reason":"Implemented CI failure artifacts for TUI tests: TuiFailureDump utility in tests/util/mod.rs with frame snapshot capture (text + ANSI), render timing JSONL, event stream, system info, bounded artifact sizes (max 10 frames, 64KB logs). Auto-captures on ftui snapshot assertion failures. Constants TUI_DUMP_MAX_FRAMES and TUI_DUMP_MAX_LOG_BYTES. Integrates with existing trace bundle format from 2noh9.4.3. Also fixed compilation issues from concurrent agent work (consent dialog borrow error, clippy lints).","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ci","debug","ftui","tests","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:41.298861163Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:39:09.370414459Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

+{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.2","title":"Task: Update documentation for ftui TUI (README, keymap/style specs, troubleshooting, env vars)","description":"## Goal
Bring docs in sync with the new ftui-based TUI.

## Scope
- `README.md`:
  - mention ftui
  - document inline mode, recording/replay flags, debug overlays
  - ensure robot-mode warnings remain
- `docs/tui_style_spec.md` and `docs/tui_keymap_rfc.md`:
  - update to ftui terminology and finalized keymap
- `TESTING.md`:
  - document snapshot tests and PTY e2e flows
  - document artifact bundles on failure

## Acceptance Criteria

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.3","title":"Task: Final UI polish pass (style spec compliance, a11y, motion budgets, terminal degradation)","description":"## Goal
Do the final pass that turns a working UI into a *world-class* UI.

## Checklist
- Style spec compliance:
  - consistent spacing
  - consistent role coloring
  - readable empty states
  - tasteful motion (if enabled)
- Accessibility:
  - contrast levels
  - a11y patterns
  - no-color mode
- Degraded terminals:
  - no glyph icons
  - plain borders
  - no gradients

## Acceptance Criteria
- The UI looks intentional and premium in common terminals.
- Nothing breaks in 80x24.
- No flicker.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:40:06.697260970Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T04:41:43.979381932Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T04:41:43.979359260Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","polish","tui","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:07.233622643Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:07.549640154Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:07.846967196Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:40:06.697260970Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.4","title":"Task: Migration release readiness (quality gates, e2e suite, perf budgets, changelog)","description":"## Goal
Define and execute the final checklist that must pass before we consider the migration done.

## Gates
- `cargo fmt --check`
- `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- `cargo test`
- TUI e2e:
  - headless smoke
  - PTY interactive flows
  - snapshot suite
- Perf budgets (render time/diff size/search latency) within thresholds

## Acceptance Criteria
- All gates pass in CI.
- Changelog mentions ftui migration + major UX improvements.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:40:20.264875839Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:09.058489439Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","release","tests","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:08.750986910Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:09.058415240Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:40:20.264875839Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:08.152616691Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:08.457033818Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
